overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, ascending from street level via a neon-lit staircase to an elevated pedestrian walkway with views of futuristic skyscrapers. The footage is from a video game engine featuring heavy rain, neon lighting, and reflective wet surfaces.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rainy cyberpunk street at night, with a hotel building glowing purple in the distance. The camera moves forward along wet asphalt reflecting neon lights, passing yellow safety barriers while approaching a staircase marked by a large red holographic symbol.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered concrete staircase, ascending through a narrow corridor with blue walls and yellow railings. Red neon light bathes the scene as the camera passes pedestrians carrying illuminated umbrellas, approaching a glowing red archway at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with city skyline views

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs onto an elevated open plaza, the camera reveals a sweeping view of the cyberpunk city skyline with towering skyscrapers and a massive holographic billboard. The walkway features glass railings and concrete benches as the camera continues forward through the rain-soaked environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked street level up into a sweeping, elevated vista of a futuristic cyberpunk skyline. It begins by gliding along wet asphalt reflecting neon lights, passing yellow safety barriers toward a hotel glowing purple in the distance and a large red holographic symbol. As the camera enters a covered concrete staircase, the environment narrows into a corridor of blue walls and yellow railings bathed in red neon light, passing pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas. The scene then opens as the camera emerges through a glowing red archway onto an elevated open plaza, where the confined space expands into a wide view of towering skyscrapers and a massive holographic billboard. The movement continues forward across the rain-soaked walkway, passing glass railings and concrete benches under the glow of the city.
